This section demonstrates various text and content components.

### Heading Hierarchy

# H1 - Main Page Title
## H2 - Section Heading
### H3 - Subsection
#### H4 - Sub-subsection
##### H5 - Minor heading
###### H6 - Smallest heading

### Text Formatting

This is **bold text** and this is *italic text*. You can also use ***bold italic***.

### Lists

**Unordered List:**
- First item
- Second item
- Third item with *emphasis*

**Ordered List:**
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

### Links and Code

Visit [our documentation](https://example.com) for more info.

Inline code: `const hello = 'world';`

### Code Blocks

function greet(name) {
  console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`);
  return true;
}
```

def calculate_sum(a, b):
    return a + b

result = calculate_sum(5, 3)
```

Low Stock"}},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Desk Organizer","description":"$24.99 - In Stock"}}]},{"type":"header","props":{"title":"User Profiles","level":2,"id":"user-profiles"}},{"type":"ProfileHeader","props":{"name":"Page Builder Agent","description":"Specialized in creating dynamic, interactive pages with advanced component systems","avatar_color":"#10b981","status":"Active","specialization":"UI/UX Generation"}},{"type":"CapabilityList","props":{"title":"Core Capabilities","capabilities":["Create dynamic pages with 20+ component types","Validate component schemas and security","Generate responsive layouts","Manage template systems","Real-time page updates","Database integration","API connectivity"]}},{"type":"header","props":{"title":"Documentation","level":2,"id":"documentation"}},{"type":"Markdown","props":{"content":"## API Documentation Example

### User Authentication Endpoint

**POST** `/api/auth/login`

#### Request Body

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "securePassword123"
}
```

#### Response

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "user": {
    "id": 12345,
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "John Doe"
  }
}
```

#### Error Responses

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Invalid credentials",
  "code": 401
}
```

### Code Examples

**JavaScript/TypeScript:**

```typescript
async function loginUser(email: string, password: string) {
  const response = await fetch('/api/auth/login', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ email, password })
  });
  
  return await response.json();
}
```

**Python:**

```python
import requests

def login_user(email, password):
    response = requests.post(
        'https://api.example.com/auth/login',
        json={'email': email, 'password': password}
    )
    return response.json()
```

**cURL:**

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.example.com/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"user@example.com","password":"secret"}'
```"}},{"type":"header","props":{"title":"Onboarding Flows","level":2,"id":"onboarding"}},{"type":"Markdown","props":{"content":"### Welcome to the Platform!
